arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic boss Shaun Maloney has his say ahead of Bolton Wanderers trip
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic manager Shaun Maloney has had success against Bolton in the past but says a win on Saturday would be top of the list.

arts.ttl: Why victory over Bolton Wanderers would be Wigan Athletic chief's 'biggest...by a mile'
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney takes charge of Wigan Athletic for the 99th time this weekend at Bolton Wanderers - and he's in no doubt as to how big a victory would be.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bolton Wanderers vs. Wigan Athletic - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Bolton Wanderers and Wigan Athletic, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
